## BugBaas 2.4.10

### Changes
- Removed product type filters and product dropdowns from bug reporting and bug viewing.
- New reports keep a compatible internal project value without showing product types in the UI.
- BugDex summary now labels remaining entries as not unlocked.
- Added the BugDex rarity type guide image to the BugDex screen.
- Added rarity colors and star indicators to BugDex trade, upgrade and active helper selection.
- Replaced duel/campaign rarity text badges with color and star indicators.

### Checks
- `npm run typecheck`
